title: Wadie Firestone
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:WadieFirestone.png]] |name=Wadie Firestone |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[Alashan]][[Star Wars Weekly 108|''Star Wars Weekly'' 108]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Star Wars Weekly 107|''Star Wars Weekly'' 107]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What—what ''happened'', Arlo? This place looks like a Star Destroyer used it for target practice. Yet—all the domes are burst from the ''inside-out!"
"''Scan for life forms, Wadie. See if anyone's still alive.''"
"''Don't get your hopes up, partner. Whoever's responsible for this did a pretty thorough job.|Wadie Firestone and Arlo Tyre|}} '''Wadie Firestone'''{{CSWECite|I|275|Firestone, Wadie}} was a [[Scout/Legends|Master Scout]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] and a partner of [[Arlo Tyre]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], both [[Gender/Legends|men]] were dispatched from headquarters to [[Alashan]] to [[Mission to Alashan|investigate]] why a Rebel [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeological]] station had missed three routine communications. The pair found [[Death/Legends|bodies]] outside and Firestone observed that the domes appeared to have burst from the inside, despite looking as though [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] had blasted them. Tyre told him to scan for life forms, but Firestone was not hopeful that they would find any. Instead, his scan detected an energy field inside the main habitat dome that he could not identify and suggested that they call for help. Tyre disagreed and told Firestone to back him up as they investigated further. However, Tyre was soon struck by an energy beam and killed. Firestone attempted to shoot and blow up the dome without success, then launched in his modified [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing scout-fighter]], intending to get word back to the Rebel Alliance. The same mysterious energy beam blasted his ship and killed him. ==Equipment== On Alashan, Firestone carried a [[Portable scanner/Legends|porta-scanner]] and armed himself with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|rifle blaster]] and [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]]. He wore a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] with an accompanying [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=World of Fire!|book=Star Wars Weekly 107|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=Star Terror!|book=Star Wars Weekly 108|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} *{{StoryCite|story=Molten Doom!|book=Star Wars Weekly 109|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Wadie Firestone}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Firestone, Wadie}} [[Category:Alliance Military members]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Scouts]]
